name: Bonnie's Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder and salt.
2. In another bowl, beat eggs. Blend in milk, butter, nutmeg and vanilla; pour into dry ingredients and mix just until moistened.
3. Fold in blueberries. Fill greased or paper-lined muffin cups two-thirds full.
4. Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes.
5. Brush tops with melted butter and sprinkle with sugar.
